positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial map design. Featuring interlocking geometric constellations formed by delicate, glowing gold lines against a deep indigo and midnight blue watercolor wash background. The central motif is a stylized, interconnected celestial bear and crescent moon constellation. The style should be sophisticated, clean line art meets cosmic watercolor. Use high contrast, with the glowing gold lines providing a strong, ethereal silhouette against the deep, velvety background. Centered composition, perfect for repeating apparel pattern or single print panel. Highly detailed, elegant, visually arresting, designed for high-quality fabric printing.
